---
id: read-chat-messages
title: "Read messages"
description: "Marks messages within the given order-id range as read. Pass an empty body to mark the entire chat as read. `type` defaults to 'messages'; use 'mentions' to mark unread @-mentions instead."
sidebar_label: "Read messages"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/reference/2025-11-08/anytype-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Read messages"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/spaces/{space_id}/chats/{chat_id}/messages/read"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Marks messages within the given order-id range as read. Pass an empty body to mark the entire chat as read. `type` defaults to "messages"; use "mentions" to mark unread @-mentions instead.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./read-chat-messages.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./read-chat-messages.StatusCodes.json")}
>
